description: Creatures defying death — restless spirits, animated corpses, and soul-draining horrors.
creatures: Skeleton
Animated bones that clatter to their feet, gripping rusted weapons from a life long forgotten.
Zombie
A shambling, groaning corpse driven by blind hunger, rotting flesh sloughing off with every step.
Ghost
A translucent figure bound to the living world by grief or rage, replaying its death endlessly.
Vampire
A pale, ageless predator that seduces victims close before draining them of every drop of blood.
Lich
A skeletal sorcerer whose soul is locked in a hidden phylactery, immortal and endlessly scheming.
Wraith
A dark, howling shade that passes through walls and withers flesh with its freezing touch.
Specter
A hateful spirit that phases through solid matter and chills souls to the bone with its grasp.
Wight
A cunning, armored corpse that fights with the skill it had in life and drains vitality with each blow.
Mummy
A bandage-wrapped corpse that rises from its sarcophagus trailing dust and ancient curses.
Ghoul
A hunched, clawed scavenger that paralyzes prey with its raking touch and feasts on the helpless.
Revenant
An undead avenger that cannot be stopped, tracking the one who wronged it across any distance.
Death Knight
A fallen paladin in blackened armor whose sword burns with hellfire and whose commands raise the dead.
Banshee
A wailing spirit whose keening shriek kills the weak-hearted and foretells doom for all who hear.
Shadow
A creeping patch of living darkness that saps strength with its touch and spawns copies of the slain.
Demilich
A floating, gem-eyed skull — all that remains of a lich — that traps souls in its teeth.
